title: Flashlight unit
abstract: A flashlight unit (100) includes a housing (3) having an opening provided with a lens (5) and a light source (7) provided in the housing (3) for emitting light through the lens (5) in a lighting direction, the light source (7) being movable in the lighting direction relative to the lens (5) for adjusting light emission. The flashlight unit (100) has an adjusting mechanism (110) including a rotatable member (2) for adjusting the position of the light source (7) in the lighting direction relative to the lens (5). There is also limiting means (120) for limiting rotational movement of the rotatable member (2) upon the light source (7) reaching a predetermined position.
